name: Meera Pillai
summary: Cybersecurity professional with 1 year of SOC experience and strong academic foundation in information security. Completed VAPT internship and holds CompTIA Security+ certification. Proficient in SIEM monitoring and log analysis. Committed to building expertise in red teaming and cloud security.

experience.title: Junior SOC Analyst
responsibilities: Monitored 1,800+ daily alerts on IBM QRadar for 5 government sector clients.
Performed initial triage and categorized incidents per client SLA; maintained 96% SLA compliance.
Wrote 3 incident response post-mortems for significant security events.
Conducted basic vulnerability scans using Nessus on client network segments.
Updated and maintained 20+ SOC playbooks for common attack vectors.

experience.title: VAPT Intern
responsibilities: Assisted in web application penetration testing using Burp Suite for 3 client engagements.
Performed reconnaissance using Shodan and OSINT techniques.
Contributed to VAPT report writing — CVSS scoring, risk classification, remediation steps.

projects.name: Network Intrusion Detection System (IDS)
projects.description: Built a lightweight network IDS that detects port scans, ARP poisoning, and brute-force patterns. Final year project — achieved 88% detection accuracy on test dataset.

achievements: KTU Scholarship for Academic Excellence – 7th Semester
1st Place – Inter-College CTF (College of Engineering Trivandrum, 2022)
